📱 واتس بوس

Booking Friction Suppression System

Built to remove manual scheduling leaks, missed callbacks, and branch-level overflow.

Dynamic Slot Routing

Automatically pushes demand to the right branch, doctor, and service lane.

No-Show Rescue Engine

Predictive reminders with smart refill suggestions for at-risk appointments.

Smart Integration

Seamless WhatsApp, SMS, and email confirmation workflows.
